title: centaurea borjae
intro: Centaurea borjae, also known as Borja's knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its tall stems and clusters of small, pinkish-purple flowers. Traditionally, Centaurea borjae has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Centaurea borjae include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to support immune system function. Centaurea borjae is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
